product_description: AI-powered sales intelligence platform that helps B2B teams identify and prioritize their best-fit prospects using real-time buying signals and predictive analytics.
value_proposition: Votrix cuts prospecting time by 80% by surfacing the leads most likely to convert, with actionable intelligence for every contact.
target_customer_description: B2B SaaS companies with 20-200 employees that have an outbound sales motion and are looking to scale their pipeline without hiring more SDRs.
pain_points_solved: Too much time spent on manual prospect research
Low response rates from generic cold outreach
Difficulty identifying which accounts to prioritize
No visibility into buying signals or intent data
SDR ramp time is too long
notes: Focus on companies that recently raised Series A/B funding
